zh.lifeSummary: Joan Dineley是William Dingley和Alice Hardwick的女兒，於1472年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦。她於1485年與Lord Richard John Rich在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1567年6月12日在英國艾可洛福德享年95歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦豪斯洛福豪斯洛福豪斯洛福 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Dineley是William Dingley和Alice Hardwick的女儿，于1472年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦。她于1485年与Lord Richard John Rich在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1567年6月12日在英国艾可洛福德享年95岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦豪斯洛福豪斯洛福豪斯洛福 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Dineley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Dineley in Cliviger (Lancs).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Joan Dineley was born in 1472, in London, Middlesex, England as the daughter of William Dingley and Alice Hardwick. She married Lord Richard John Rich in 1485, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 June 1567, in Rochford, Essex, England, at the age of 95, and was buried in Hounslow Cemetery, Hounslow, Hounslow, London, England, United Kingdom.

Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 juin 1567, à Rochford, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterrée à Hounslow Cemetery, Hounslow, Hounslow, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Dineleyは1472年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでWilliam DingleyとAlice Hardwickの娘として生まれた。1485年にイギリスイギリスでLord Richard John Richと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1567年6月12日にイギリスエセックスロチフォードで95歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンホーウンスロウホーウンスロウホーウンスロウ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Hounslow Cemetery, Hounslow, Greater Lon: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 허슬로 허슬로 허슬로 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Dineley(은)는 1472년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 William Dingley(와)과 Alice Hardwick의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1485년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lord Richard John Rich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1567년 6월 12일 영국 에세스 록h퍼드에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 허슬로 허슬로 허슬로 세멧리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Dineley родилась в 1472 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. Её родителей звали William Dingley и Alice Hardwick. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Richard John Rich в 1485 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 июня 1567 г. в местности рочфорд, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 95 лет и была похоронена в местности хоунслоу кеметири, хоунслоу, хоунслоу, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
